GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT
This agreement is governed by the laws of Netherlands. All disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Amsterdam.
Each partner shall make an initial capital contribution of 20000 EUR.
Profits and losses shall be shared equally between the partners.
Decisions regarding the management of the partnership require the consent of both partners.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
